creator: salvadore@freebsd.org
text:
Build fails with GCC 14. This blocks GCC_DEFAULT update to GCC 14.

====>  Build libelf
=====>  Configure
loading site script /usr/ports/Templates/config.site
creating cache ./config.cache
checking whether gmake sets ${MAKE}... yes
checking for gcc... gcc14
checking whether the C compiler (gcc14 -O2 -pipe  -DLIBICONV_PLUG -fstack-protector-strong -Wl,-rpath=/usr/local/lib/gcc14 -fno-strict-aliasing   -fstack-protector-strong -Wl,-rpath=/usr/local/lib/gcc14 -L/usr/local/lib/gcc14 ) works... no
configure: error: installation or configuration problem: C compiler cannot create executables.
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make[1]: stopped in /wrkdirs/usr/ports/devel/gcc-arm-embedded/work
*** Error code 1

Stop.

Full log: https://pkg-status.freebsd.org/gohan04/data/140amd64-default-foo/2024-08-29_19h57m48s/logs/errors/gcc-arm-embedded-10.3.20210921.log

Useful link: https://gcc.gnu.org/gcc-14/porting_to.html
